ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 220, DEFENDANT METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. PARTIES SUBMITTED TO THE TENTATIVE RULING. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO ISSUES 1-4 (STRICT LIABILITY, FALSE REPRESENTATION/INTENTIONAL TORT AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES). DEFENDANT SATISFIED ITS BURDEN OF PRODUCTION AND PLAINTIFFS DID NOT PRESENT EVIDENCE CREATING A TRIABLE FACT THAT DEFENDANT SOLD OR SUPPLIED THE INSULATION ATTRIBUTABLE TO DEFENDANT THAT MR. MASON WAS EXPOSED TO OR THAT DEFENDANT MADE A FALSE REPRESENTATION, COMMITTED AN INTENTIONAL TORT OR OTHERWISE ACTED IN A WAY THAT CONSTITUTES MALICE, FRAUD OR OPPRESSION. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-07-2010 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Oct-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Patrick M. Malone, Esq. of MCNAMARA, NEY, BEATTY & SLATTERY (925-939-4053), appearing for defendant / moving party Metalclad Insulation Corporation
Anne T. Acuna, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Laurie Orr, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Parties submitted to the tentative ruling. Tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Metalclad Insulation Corporation's motion for summary adjudication is granted as to issues 1-4 (strict liability, false representation/intentional tort and punitive damages). Defendant satisfied its burden of production and plaintiffs did not present evidence creating a triable fact that defendant sold or supplied the insulation attributable to defendant that Mr. Mason was exposed to or that defendant made a false representation, committed an intentional tort or otherwise acted in a way that constitutes malice, fraud or oppression. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(220/HEK)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-06-2010 Off Calendar

DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2010 Set For Trial On Nov-15-10 At 11:15 A.M. In Dept 220
